raw_text:
CloudSync Systems

Junior Site Reliability
Engineer

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA
(Remote-friendly)

TYPE

Full-time

COMPENSATION

$85,000 - $110,000 per
year

TECH STACK

Kubernetes

Docker

Prometheus

Grafana

Python

Bash

Jaeger (Distributed
Tracing)

Alertmanager

Linux/Ubuntu

Git

About CloudSync Systems: CloudSync Systems is
a mid-stage infrastructure platform company
that helps organizations build and maintain
resilient cloud-native applications. We
provide observability and automation tools
that enable teams to manage complex
distributed systems with confidence. Founded
in 2019, we serve hundreds of customers across
fintech, e-commerce, and media industries.

We're hiring a Junior Site Reliability
Engineer to join our Platform Reliability
team. You'll work alongside experienced SREs
to build and maintain the infrastructure that
powers our customers' applications. In this
role, you'll gain hands-on experience with
containerization, monitoring, incident
response, and automation. This is an excellent
opportunity to launch your career in SRE while
learning from industry practitioners in a
collaborative, supportive environment.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Assist in deploying and managing Kubernetes
clusters in production environments under
mentor supervision

Monitor application and infrastructure
health using Prometheus and Grafana,
learning to identify and escalate anomalies

Participate in on-call rotations (non-
primary) and shadow experienced SREs during
incidents to understand troubleshooting
workflows

Write and maintain monitoring dashboards and
alerting rules for key services and
infrastructure metrics

Contribute to runbooks and documentation for
common operational procedures and incident
response workflows

Implement observability improvements by
adding instrumentation to Python services
and analyzing distributed traces in Jaeger

Reliable infrastructure thatscales with your ambition Collaborate with platform engineers to
define and track SLOs/SLIs for internal
services, learning how to measure
reliability

Automate routine operational tasks using
Bash scripts and Python, reducing manual
toil across the team

REQUIREMENTS

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science,
Engineering, or related field (or equivalent
professional experience)

Foundational knowledge of Linux/Unix systems
and command-line tools

Basic understanding of networking concepts
(TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP) and how the internet
works

Familiarity with containerization concepts
or hands-on experience with Docker

Strong desire to learn cloud infrastructure

and commitment to operational excellence

BONUS POINTS

Previous internship or coursework experience
with Kubernetes or container orchestration

Experience writing scripts in Python or Go
for automation tasks

Prior exposure to monitoring and
observability tools like Prometheus or
Grafana

Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and Git
version control

BENEFITS

Comprehensive health insurance (medical,
dental, vision) with company coverage
starting day one

401(k) matching up to 4% and financial
wellness resources

Unlimited paid time off plus 10 company
holidays

Professional development budget ($2,000
annually for courses, conferences,
certifications)

 Mentorship program pairing you with senior
SREs for career growth

Remote-friendly work environment with
flexible hours

Quarterly team offsites and learning
sessions focused on SRE best practices

APPLY

Submit your resume, a brief cover letter, and
a link to your GitHub profile (if available)
to careers@cloudsync.systems. Include a short
note about why you're interested in SRE and

any relevant projects or experiences. We
review applications on a rolling basis and aim
to respond within one week.
